package.name: phm_ood_cpp
package.description: C++ (rclcpp) rolling-spread OOD runtime node for the Policy Health Monitor. Subscribes phm_msgs/PolicyEmbedding on /policy/embedding, maintains a rolling window, computes the rolling spread (sum over dims of the windowed population variance, the same math as phm_core.calibration.rolling_spread), applies a calibrated threshold with consecutive-hysteresis, and publishes a phm_msgs/DetectorVerdict on /phm/verdicts with source "phm_ood_cpp". The rolling-spread kernel is behind a pluggable Backend interface (dependency-free std::vector default, optional Eigen, optional LibTorch).
